prompt: A high-end fashion editorial double-paneled split poster, presenting a luxurious, artistic, and international fashion magazine cover aesthetic. The composition is symmetrical, carrying the vibe of a high-fashion art poster and premium advertisement. On the left is an elegant young Asian female model in a full-body standing pose, confident and composed with a cool editorial expression. She wears Mongolian attire primarily in sky blue satin, featuring diagonal collars, black-gold pattern trim, colorful embroidery, white fur edging, a dome ethnic hat, and matching boots, overall bright, ornate, and agile. The background is a vast green grassland stretching into the distance with sheep, creating a natural and fresh atmosphere. On the right is a mature, handsome young male model in a relaxed yet powerful standing pose. He has slightly curly hair and sharp features, wearing an outfit characterized by a rose-red satin robe, colorful patchwork sleeves, leopard print fur trim, and a silver waist buckle, presenting a bold and rugged ethnic stage style. The right background features rolling snow-capped mountains and a soaring eagle, creating an epic sense of natural power while maintaining a clean fashion composition.
